mapper.sql: select o.mall_order_id, o.mall_order_no, o.user_id, o.venue_id, o.total_cents, o.amount_paid, o.balance_cents, o.points_used, o.points_deduct_cents, o.status, o.remark, o.redeem_code, o.pay_trade_no, o.paid_time, o.redeemed_time, o.redeemed_by, o.create_by, o.create_time, o.update_by, o.update_time, u.nickname as nickname from fish_mall_order o left join fish_user u on o.user_id = u.user_id
mapper.select: where o.redeem_code = #{code} order by o.mall_order_id desc limit 1
where o.user_id = #{userId} order by o.mall_order_id desc

where o.status = 0 and o.create_time <= #{threshold} and not exists ( select 1 from fish_order fo where fo.status in (0, 2) and fo.mall_order_ids is not null and fo.mall_order_ids != '' and find_in_set(o.mall_order_id, replace(fo.mall_order_ids, ' ', '')) > 0 ) order by o.mall_order_id asc
mapper.insert: insert into fish_mall_order (mall_order_no, user_id, venue_id, total_cents, amount_paid, balance_cents, points_used, points_deduct_cents, status, remark, redeem_code, create_time) values (#{mallOrderNo}, #{userId}, #{venueId}, #{totalCents}, #{amountPaid}, #{balanceCents}, #{pointsUsed}, #{pointsDeductCents}, #{status}, #{remark2}, #{redeemCode}, sysdate())
mapper.update: update fish_mall_order set status = #{newStatus}, update_time = sysdate() where mall_order_id = #{mallOrderId} and status = #{expectedStatus}
mapper.insert: insert into fish_mall_order_item (mall_order_id, goods_id, name, subtitle, cover, price_cents, qty) values (#{mallOrderId}, #{goodsId}, #{name}, #{subtitle}, #{cover}, #{priceCents}, #{qty})
mapper.select: select item_id, mall_order_id, goods_id, name, subtitle, cover, price_cents, qty from fish_mall_order_item where mall_order_id = #{mallOrderId} order by item_id asc
